# Clean Index

Resolving wikilinks of every accepted Obsidian form — all WORKING, none are C1 findings:

- bare note-name: [[Note]]
- path-qualified: [[sub/SubNote]]
- `.md`-suffixed: [[Note.md]]
- bare + heading suffix: [[Note#Section One]]
- bare + alias: [[Note|the note]]

A resolving section pointer (no C2 finding): `Note.md` §Section One.
